steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8020 and log in with admin/admin
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded showing 'A-Share Quant Dashboard Online'

steps.expected: Backtest page loads with strategy dropdown
steps.observed: Backtest page loaded with 'Run backtest' tab active, strategy combobox present
Dropdown expanded showing 'chan_theory' as an option

evidence.consoleErrors: 404 errors from unimplemented polling endpoints (expected per AGENTS.md)

assertions.title: Backtest execution from FreqUI

steps.expected: Strategy selected, Start backtest button enabled
steps.observed: chan_theory selected, 'Start backtest' button became enabled (no longer disabled)

steps.expected: Backtest starts and completes with results
steps.observed: Backtest completed near-instantly. 'Analyze result', 'Visualize summary', and 'Visualize result' tabs became enabled. A notification showed 'Strategy undefined not found' but results were populated.
7 trades displayed in Single trades table with pair names, profit %, open/close dates

evidence.consoleErrors: TypeError errors in backtestMetrics (RangeError: Invalid time value, Cannot read 'length'/'map'/'split' of undefined) - schema compatibility issues

assertions.issues: Minor: Notification shows 'Strategy undefined not found' after backtest starts (strategy name not retained in POST response). Backtest summary section on Run backtest tab is empty. Some fields show 'N/A (undefinedx)' for Total stake amount and 'Tot Profit undefined' header.

assertions.title: Equity curve chart display

steps.action: Navigate to Dashboard after backtest completes
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'Cumulative Profit' chart with time (dates) on X-axis and Profit on Y-axis, plus 'Profit over time' chart with Absolute profit and Trade Count

steps.action: Check Visualize summary tab on backtest page
steps.observed: Visualize summary shows 'Trades log' (per-trade profit bar chart) and 'Trades durations' box plot

assertions.issues: The equity/cumulative profit chart appears on the Dashboard page rather than directly on the Backtest results page. The Backtest 'Visualize summary' tab shows per-trade profit bars, not a cumulative equity curve.

assertions.title: Trade list display

steps.expected: Trade list table with pair, dates, profit
steps.observed: Table shows 7 trades with columns: ID, Pair, Amount, Total stake amount, Open rate, Close rate, Profit %, Open date, Close date, Close Reason

assertions.issues: Total stake amount shows 'N/A (undefinedx)' — likely missing stake_currency field in API response. Close Reason column is empty for all trades.

assertions.title: Performance metrics display

steps.action: Check 'Analyze result' tab for performance metrics
steps.expected: Summary showing win rate, profit factor, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown
steps.observed: 'Results per Exit reason' section has headers but no data rows. 'Backtesting summary' section on Run backtest tab is completely empty.
Dashboard shows W/L: 3/4, Closed Profit: 35.06% (7976.76) but no Sharpe ratio, profit factor, or max drawdown displayed
API returns all metrics: winrate=0.43, profit_factor=1.07, sharpe=0.21, max_drawdown=-0.42, sortino=0.28. Data exists but FreqUI cannot parse/display it.

evidence.consoleErrors: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') in backtestMetrics-B8FGALgx.js; RangeError: Invalid time value in backtestMetrics; TypeError: Cannot read 'map' of undefined in BacktestingView
evidence.network: GET /api/v1/backtest -> 200 with all metrics in response

assertions.issues: Performance metrics (win rate, Sharpe, profit factor, max drawdown) are present in the API response but FreqUI fails to parse and display them. The 'Backtesting summary' section on the Run backtest tab renders empty. The 'Results per Exit reason' table has headers but no data. Console errors indicate schema incompatibility in backtestMetrics parsing (missing or misformatted fields like backtest_start_ts/backtest_end_ts, exit_reason aggregation data).

assertions.title: End-to-end backtest flow

steps.observed: FreqUI welcome page loaded with Login button
Dashboard loaded showing 'A-Share Quant Dashboard Online' status
Backtest page loaded with strategy selector, parameters, date range
Backtest completed near-instantly, results tabs enabled
Dashboard shows Cumulative Profit chart with time vs profit; Backtest Visualize summary shows Trades log
7 trades displayed with pair, profit %, dates
Dashboard shows W/L: 3/4, Closed Profit: 35.06%. Detailed metrics (Sharpe, drawdown) not displayed in UI though available in API.

evidence.consoleErrors: Multiple JS errors: TypeError and RangeError in backtest metrics parsing; 404 errors from unimplemented endpoints

assertions.issues: End-to-end flow works: login → strategy selection → backtest execution → results display. However, FreqUI shows JS console errors indicating schema compatibility gaps. Backtesting summary section is empty. Some fields show 'undefined' values.

assertions.title: API schema FreqTrade compatibility

steps.action: Check browser console for JavaScript errors after full backtest flow
steps.observed: Multiple JavaScript errors found

evidence.consoleErrors: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split') in TimeRangeSelect; TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') in backtestMetrics; TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') in BacktestingView (x2); RangeError: Invalid time value in backtestMetrics; TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach') in chart rendering; AxiosError 404 on getStrategy, getBacktestMarketChange, and polling endpoints
evidence.network: Multiple 404 responses from unimplemented endpoints; core endpoints return 200 but with incomplete schema

assertions.issues: FreqUI encounters numerous JavaScript errors when parsing backtest results. Key issues: (1) backtest_start_ts/backtest_end_ts format causes RangeError: Invalid time value, (2) exit_reason/sell_reason aggregation data missing causes 'undefined.length/map' errors, (3) Strategy detail endpoint returns 404 after backtest causing 'Strategy undefined not found' notification, (4) TimeRangeSelect.split error suggests timerange format mismatch. While FreqUI renders the core data (trades, charts), the backtesting summary section is blank and several fields show 'undefined'.

assertions.title: Market change data in backtest results

steps.expected: History with at least one entry
steps.observed: Multiple entries returned, latest: backtest-result-chan_theory-2025-11-01-2026-03-24-326.json

steps.expected: Market change data with date and performance values
steps.observed: 200 response with columns ['date', 'market_change'], 65 data points from 2025-11-03 to 2026-01-20, showing cumulative market change from 0.0 to 0.046194

evidence.consoleErrors: FreqUI's getBacktestMarketChange call returned 404 (FreqUI may use a different URL pattern than the implemented endpoint)

assertions.issues: The market_change endpoint works via direct API call. However, FreqUI's internal call to getBacktestMarketChange returned 404, suggesting the URL pattern FreqUI uses may differ from the implemented endpoint.

assertions.title: Strategy vs benchmark visual comparison

steps.action: Check all backtest result tabs for benchmark comparison
steps.expected: Visual comparison of strategy vs benchmark index
steps.observed: No benchmark comparison visible. Visualize summary shows only Trades log and Trades durations. Dashboard shows Cumulative Profit but no benchmark overlay.

steps.action: Check if market_change data is displayed anywhere in FreqUI
steps.expected: Market change percentage or benchmark chart visible
steps.observed: Market change data not displayed. FreqUI's getBacktestMarketChange call failed with 404. Console error: TypeError Cannot read 'forEach' of undefined in chart rendering.

evidence.consoleErrors: AxiosError 404 on getBacktestMarketChange; TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach')

assertions.issues: No visual benchmark comparison is displayed in FreqUI. The market_change API endpoint exists and returns data when called directly, but FreqUI's internal request fails (likely uses a different URL pattern). The chart rendering code throws TypeError when market_change data is undefined. No CSI 300 or ChiNext benchmark overlay appears on any chart.

frictions.description: After selecting chan_theory and clicking 'Start backtest', a notification appears saying 'Strategy undefined not found'. The backtest still completes successfully, but the strategy name is lost from the dropdown after submission.

The 'Backtesting summary' section on the 'Run backtest' tab is always empty after backtest completion, even though the API returns all performance metrics. FreqUI cannot parse the backtest result schema to populate this section.

Trade list shows 'N/A (undefinedx)' for Total stake amount and 'Tot Profit undefined' as a column header. These indicate missing or misnamed fields in the API response (likely stake_currency and sell_reason/exit_reason).
FreqUI's internal call to market_change endpoint returns 404, preventing benchmark data from being displayed in the backtest results visualization.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 5 passed, 4 failed. Core backtest flow works end-to-end (login, strategy selection, backtest execution, trade list display). VAL-UI-003 (strategy dropdown), VAL-UI-004 (backtest execution), VAL-UI-005 (equity curve on Dashboard), VAL-UI-006 (trade list), VAL-CROSS-001 (E2E flow), and VAL-BENCH-001 (market_change API) pass. VAL-UI-007 (performance metrics display) fails because FreqUI cannot render Sharpe/drawdown/profit factor from the API response. VAL-CROSS-003 (schema compatibility) fails due to multiple JS errors from mismatched response schemas. VAL-BENCH-002 (visual benchmark comparison) fails because FreqUI's market_change request returns 404 and no benchmark overlay is shown.
